173	                ok, msg = self.dispatcher.dispatch(action, case_id=case_id)
174	                post_ok = ok
175	                # 分发成功: 提取实际点击元素的文本, 回填到 action, 供 codegen 生成正确脚本
176	                if ok and action.type == "click" and action.value is None and action.selector:

179	                            "el => (el.textContent || el.value || '').trim().slice(0, 50)"
180	                        )
181	                        if actual_text:

183	                    except Exception:
184	                        pass
185	
186	            status = "PASS" if ok else "FAIL"
187	
188	            # 关键步骤失败阻断: api_call 失败或断言中仍有未替换的变量, 后续步骤无意义, 直接终止

192	                    r = ExecResult(
193	                        step_no=seq, raw_text=action.intent, action=action.type, status="FAIL",
194	                        duration_ms=duration, error=msg, message=msg,
195	                    )
196	                    results.append(r)

198	                    self._render(case_id, results)
199	                    return results
200	                if action.is_assert() and ("${" in (action.intent or "") or "${" in (action.value or "")):
201	                    self.console.print(f"  [red]断言中存在未替换变量, 终止用例执行[/red]")
202	                    r = ExecResult(
203	                        step_no=seq, raw_text=action.intent, action=action.type, status="FAIL",
204	                        duration_ms=duration, error=msg, message=msg,
205	                    )
206	                    results.append(r)
207	                    self._save_exec_log(results)
208	                    self._render(case_id, results)
209	                    return results
210	            duration = int((time.time() - t0) * 1000)
211	            shot = self._screenshot(seq, status) if (not ok and self.shot_fail) else None
212	            # selector/resolved_html 等字段用于报告排查定位结果.
213	            r = ExecResult(
214	                step_no=seq, raw_text=action.intent, action=action.type, status=status,
215	                duration_ms=duration, error=None if ok else msg,
216	                screenshot=str(shot) if shot else None, message=msg,
217	                selector=action.selector, locator_repr=action.selector,

219	            )
220	
221	            # 步骤⑲ 可观测性: 步骤结束
222	            if self.observability:
223	                self.observability.end_step(seq, r)
224	            self._log_result(r)
225	            results.append(r)
226	            last_post_ok = post_ok
227	
228	        self._save_exec_log(results)
229	        self._render(case_id, results)
230	        return results
231	
232	    def _run_readiness(self, action: PlannedAction, case_id: str, results: list[ExecResult], seq: int) -> int:
233	        """执行就绪检查; 未就绪则跑恢复动作并记录."""
234	        rdy = self.readiness_checker.check(self.dispatcher.page, action)
235	        if self.trace:
236	            self.trace.emit(
237	                "readiness",
238	                ready=rdy.ready,
239	                note=rdy.note,
240	                recovery=[
241	                    {"type": r.type, "intent": r.intent, "value": r.value}
242	                    for r in rdy.recovery
243	                ],
244	            )
245	        if rdy.ready:
246	            return seq
247	        if rdy.note:
248	            self.console.print(f"  [yellow]就绪检查: {rdy.note}[/yellow]")
249	        for rec in rdy.recovery:
250	            # 恢复动作也进入执行日志, 方便复盘为什么步骤编号中间多了恢复步骤.
251	            seq += 1
252	            t0 = time.time()
253	            self.console.print(f"  [magenta]↺ 恢复 Step {seq:02d}[/magenta] [{rec.type}] {rec.intent}")
254	            ok, msg = self.dispatcher.dispatch(rec, case_id=case_id)
255	            results.append(ExecResult(
256	                step_no=seq, raw_text=f"[恢复] {rec.intent}", action=rec.type,
257	                status="PASS" if ok else "FAIL", duration_ms=int((time.time() - t0) * 1000),
258	                error=None if ok else msg, message=msg, selector=rec.selector,
259	                locator_repr=rec.selector,
260	            ))
261	        return seq
262	
263	    # ---------- 输出 ----------
264	    def _screenshot(self, step_no: int, status: str) -> Path:
265	        path = self.screens_dir / f"step_{step_no:03d}_{status.lower()}.png"
266	        try:
267	            # 失败截图不使用 full_page, 降低截图耗时并保留当前视口状态.
268	            self.dispatcher.page.screenshot(path=str(path), full_page=False)
269	        except Exception:
270	            pass
271	        return path
272	
273	    def _log_result(self, r: ExecResult) -> None:
274	        color = {"PASS": "green", "FAIL": "red"}.get(r.status, "white")
275	        mark = {"PASS": "✔", "FAIL": "✘"}.get(r.status, "?")
276	        self.console.print(f"  [{color}]{mark} {r.status}[/{color}] ({r.duration_ms}ms) {r.message or ''}")
277	        if r.error:
278	            self.console.print(f"  [red]Error: {r.error}[/red]")
279	
280	    def _save_exec_log(self, results: list[ExecResult]) -> None:
281	        # JSON 日志保留完整结构化字段, 比控制台文本更适合自动分析.
282	        data = [asdict(r) for r in results]
283	        (self.out_dir / "执行日志.json").write_text(
284	            json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8"
285	        )
286	
287	    def _render(self, case_id: str, results: list[ExecResult]) -> None:
288	        # HTML 报告生成失败不影响用例执行结果, 仅打印告警.
289	        total_ms = sum(r.duration_ms for r in results)
290	        report_dir = self.out_dir / "报告"
291	        try:
292	            render_report(case_id, "", total_ms, results, report_dir)
293	        except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
294	            self.console.print(f"[yellow]报告生成失败: {e}[/yellow]")
295

7	
8	import re
9	from typing import Any, Optional

17	class ActionDispatcher:
18	    """把 PlannedAction 转成 Playwright 调用, 并屏蔽定位与执行细节."""
19	
20	    def __init__(
21	        self,
22	        page: Any,
23	        resolver: LocatorResolver,
24	        default_timeout_ms: int = 10000,
25	        trace: Optional[ExecutionTrace] = None,
26	        api_runner: Optional[Any] = None,       # ApiRunner 实例, 用于 api_call 动作
27	    ) -> None:
28	        self.page = page
29	        self.resolver = resolver
30	        self.default_timeout = default_timeout_ms
31	        self.trace = trace
32	        self.api_runner = api_runner
33	        self.api_context: dict[str, Any] = {}    # api_call 返回的变量, 用于后续动作替换

35	    def set_page(self, page: Any) -> None:
36	        """新标签页切换后更新页面对象."""
37	        self.page = page

39	    def dispatch(self, action: PlannedAction, case_id: str = "") -> tuple[bool, str]:
40	        """执行单个动作, 返回是否成功以及供日志/后校验使用的说明."""
41	        t = action.type
42	        try:
43	            # 不需要元素定位的动作先直接处理.
44	            if t == "goto":
45	                self.page.goto(action.value or "", timeout=self.default_timeout)
46	                ok, msg = True, f"跳转到 {action.value}"
47	            elif t == "wait":
48	                ok, msg = self._wait(action)
49	            elif t in ("assert_text", "asset"):
50	                ok, msg = self._assert_text(action)
51	            elif t == "assert_table":
52	                ok, msg = self._assert_table(action)
53	            elif t == "api_call":
54	                ok, msg = self._api_call(action)
55	            elif action.needs_locating():
56	                loc, target_html = self._resolve(action)
57	                if loc is None:
58	                    if self.trace:
59	                        self.trace.emit(
60	                            "locate",
61	                            source="失败",
62	                            selector=None,
63	                            target_html=None,
64	                            hint=action.resolve_hint,
65	                            exclude=action.exclude_selectors,
66	                        )
67	                    ok, msg = False, f"找不到元素: {action.intent}"
68	                else:
69	                    ok, msg = self._run_located(t, loc, action, target_html)
70	            else:
71	                ok, msg = False, f"未支持的动作类型: {t}"
72	            if self.trace:
73	                self.trace.emit("dispatch", type=t, ok=ok, message=msg)
74	            return ok, msg
75	        except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
76	            msg = f"{type(e).__name__}: {e}"
77	            if self.trace:
78	                self.trace.emit("dispatch", type=t, ok=False, message=msg)
79	            return False, msg
80	
81	    # ---------- 定位 ----------
82	    def _resolve(self, action: PlannedAction):
83	        if action.force_selector:
84	            info = normalize_info(infer_from_selector(action.force_selector))
85	            info["_source"] = "强制复用"
86	            if self.trace:
87	                self.trace.emit(
88	                    "locate_chain",
89	                    intent=action.intent,
90	                    action_type=action.type,
91	                    hint=action.resolve_hint,
92	                    exclude=action.exclude_selectors,
93	                    steps=[{"level": "强制复用", "status": "命中", "selector": action.force_selector, "note": ""}],
94	                    llm_called=False,
95	                    hit_level="强制复用",
96	                    hit_selector=action.force_selector,
97	                )
98	        else:
99	            # 正常路径交给五级定位链; exclude/hint 来自后校验重试.
100	            info = self.resolver.resolve(
101	                self.page, action.intent, action.type,
102	                exclude=action.exclude_selectors, hint=action.resolve_hint,
103	            )
104	        if not info:
105	            return None, None
106	        info = normalize_info(info)
107	        loc = resolve_locator(self.page, info)
108	        action.locator_info = info
109	        action.selector = info_key(info)
110	        target_html = None
111	        try:
112	            target_html = loc.evaluate("el => el.outerHTML.slice(0, 200)")
113	        except Exception:
114	            target_html = None
115	        if self.trace:
116	            self.trace.emit(
117	                "locate",
118	                source=info.get("_source", "未知"),
119	                selector=info_key(info),
120	                method=info.get("method"),
121	                nth=info.get("nth", 0),
122	                target_html=target_html,
123	                hint=action.resolve_hint,
124	            )
125	        return loc, target_html
126	
127	    _SELECT_ANCESTOR_XPATH = (
128	        "xpath=ancestor::*["
129	        "contains(@class,'ant-select') or contains(@class,'el-select') or "
130	        "contains(@class,'n-select') or contains(@class,'arco-select') or "
131	        "contains(@class,'v-select')"
132	        "][1]"
133	    )
134	
135	    def _click_combobox_trigger(self, loc: Any, timeout: int) -> None:
136	        """在已定位 combobox 元素的祖先链上点击最近的 Select 容器."""
137	        try:
138	            loc.locator(self._SELECT_ANCESTOR_XPATH).click(timeout=timeout)
139	            try:
140	                self.page.wait_for_selector(
141	                    '[role="listbox"], .ant-select-dropdown, .el-select-dropdown',
142	                    timeout=2000,
143	                )
144	            except Exception:
145	                pass
146	        except Exception:
147	            loc.click(timeout=timeout, force=True)
148	
149	    # ---------- 已定位动作执行 ----------
150	    def _run_located(self, t: str, loc, action: PlannedAction, target_html: Optional[str]) -> tuple[bool, str]:
151	        timeout = self.default_timeout
152	        suffix = f" | 实际目标: {target_html}" if target_html else ""
153	        if t == "click":
154	            try:
155	                role = loc.evaluate("el => el.getAttribute('role')")
156	            except Exception:
157	                role = None
158	            if role == "combobox":
159	                # combobox 多为 Select 内层 input. 必须在「已定位元素」的祖先链上
160	                # 找最近的下拉容器并点击, 禁止 page.locator('.ant-select').first()
161	                # (会误点页面上第一个下拉, 如把「来源」点成「状态」).
162	                self._click_combobox_trigger(loc, timeout)
163	            else:
164	                loc.click(timeout=timeout)
165	            self._maybe_switch_page()
166	            return True, f"点击 {action.intent}{suffix}"
167	        if t == "hover":
168	            loc.hover(timeout=timeout)
169	            return True, f"悬停 {action.intent}{suffix}"
170	        if t == "fill":
171	            loc.fill(action.value or "", timeout=timeout)
172	            return True, f"输入 {action.value!r}{suffix}"
173	        if t == "press":
174	            loc.press(action.value or "Enter", timeout=timeout)
175	            return True, f"按键 {action.value}{suffix}"
176	        if t == "upload":
177	            loc.set_input_files(action.value or "", timeout=timeout)
178	            return True, f"上传 {action.value}{suffix}"
179	        if t == "assert_count":
180	            expected = int(action.value or 0)
181	            actual = loc.count()
182	            return (actual == expected), f"计数 期望{expected} 实际{actual}"
183	        return False, f"未支持的已定位动作: {t}"
184	
185	    def _maybe_switch_page(self) -> None:
186	        """点击后若打开了新标签页, 切换页面对象."""
187	        try:
188	            ctx = self.page.context
189	            pages = ctx.pages
190	            if pages and pages[-1] is not self.page:
191	                # 约定最新页为点击后打开的新页面.
192	                self.page = pages[-1]
193	                self.page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=self.default_timeout)
194	        except Exception:
195	            pass
196	
197	    # ---------- 等待 ----------
198	    def _wait(self, action: PlannedAction) -> tuple[bool, str]:
199	        val = (action.value or "").strip()
200	        num = _as_duration_ms(val)
201	        if num is not None:
202	            self.page.wait_for_timeout(num)
203	            return True, f"等待 {num}ms"
204	        # 文本等待
205	        # 没有明确时长时, 把 value/intent 当作需要出现的页面文本.
206	        text = val or action.intent
207	        try:
208	            self.page.wait_for_function(
209	                "t => document.body && document.body.innerText.includes(t)",
210	                arg=text, timeout=self.default_timeout,
211	            )
212	            return True, f"等待文本出现 {text!r}"
213	        except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
214	            return False, f"等待文本超时 {text!r}: {e}"
215	
216	    # ---------- 文本断言 (含否定断言) ----------
217	    def _assert_text(self, action: PlannedAction) -> tuple[bool, str]:
218	        target = (action.value or action.intent or "").strip()
219	        if not target:
220	            return False, "断言缺少目标文本"
221	        try:
222	            body_text = self.page.inner_text("body")
223	        except Exception:
224	            body_text = self.page.content()
225	        present = target in body_text
226	        # negate=true 表示"页面不应包含该文本".
227	        if action.negate:
228	            return (not present), (f"否定断言: 页面{'仍包含' if present else '不包含'} {target!r}")
229	        return present, (f"断言: 页面{'包含' if present else '不包含'} {target!r}")
230	
231	    def _assert_table(self, action: PlannedAction) -> tuple[bool, str]:
232	        """断言表格中某行某列的值 (行由 value / extras.row_key 标识)."""
233	        extras = action.extras or {}
234	        row_key = (action.value or extras.get("row_key") or "").strip()
235	        key_col = str(extras.get("row_key_column") or "工单ID").strip()
236	        target_col = str(extras.get("column") or "").strip()
237	        expected = str(extras.get("expected") or extras.get("cell_value") or "").strip()
238	        if not row_key:
239	            return False, "assert_table 缺少行标识 (value 或 extras.row_key)"
240	        if not target_col or not expected:
241	            return False, "assert_table 缺少 extras.column 或 extras.expected"
242	
243	        tables = self.page.locator("table")
244	        n_tables = tables.count()
245	        for ti in range(n_tables):
246	            table = tables.nth(ti)
247	            headers = [h.strip() for h in table.locator("thead th, thead td").all_inner_texts()]
248	            if not headers:
249	                continue
250	            if key_col not in headers or target_col not in headers:
251	                continue
252	            key_idx = headers.index(key_col)
253	            col_idx = headers.index(target_col)
254	            body_rows = table.locator("tbody tr")
255	            for ri in range(body_rows.count()):
256	                cells = [c.strip() for c in body_rows.nth(ri).locator("td").all_inner_texts()]
257	                if key_idx >= len(cells):
258	                    continue
259	                if row_key not in cells[key_idx]:
260	                    continue
261	                actual = cells[col_idx] if col_idx < len(cells) else ""
262	                if expected in actual or actual == expected:
263	                    return True, (
264	                        f"表格断言: 行标识 {row_key!r} 列 {target_col!r} "
265	                        f"期望 {expected!r} 实际 {actual!r}"
266	                    )
267	                return False, (
268	                    f"表格断言: 行标识 {row_key!r} 列 {target_col!r} "
269	                    f"期望 {expected!r} 实际 {actual!r}"
270	                )
271	        return False, (
272	            f"表格断言: 未找到行标识 {row_key!r} (列 {key_col!r}) "
273	            f"或列 {target_col!r}"
274	        )
275	
276	    # ---------- API 调用 ----------
277	    def _api_call(self, action: PlannedAction) -> tuple[bool, str]:
278	        """执行 api_call 动作: 把 intent 描述交给 API runner 执行, 并回填变量到动作列表."""
279	        if not self.api_runner:
280	            return False, "API runner 未初始化, 无法执行 api_call"
281	        try:
282	            import sys
283	            sys.stdout.write(f"\n  📡 API 调用: {action.intent}\n")
284	            sys.stdout.flush()
285	            context = self.api_runner.run_preconditions([action.intent])
286	            if context:
287	                # 把 API 返回值存到 dispatcher, 供后续动作的变量替换使用
288	                self.api_context.update(context)
289	                vars_summary = ", ".join(f"{k}={v}" for k, v in context.items())
290	                sys.stdout.write(f"  └─ 返回: {vars_summary}\n")
291	                sys.stdout.flush()
292	                return True, f"API 调用成功: {vars_summary}"
293	            sys.stdout.write(f"  └─ 未返回有效结果\n")
294	            sys.stdout.flush()
295	            return False, "API 调用未返回有效结果"
296	        except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
297	            sys.stdout.write(f"  └─ 失败: {e}\n")
298	            sys.stdout.flush()
299	            return False, f"API 调用失败: {e}"
300	
301	
302	def _as_duration_ms(val: str) -> Optional[int]:
303	    """'2000' / '2秒' / '2s' / '500ms' → 毫秒; 非时长返回 None."""
304	    if not val:
305	        return None
306	    m = re.fullmatch(r"\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*(ms|毫秒|s|秒|)?\s*", val)
307	    if not m:
308	        return None
309	    n = float(m.group(1))
310	    unit = m.group(2) or ""
311	    if unit in ("ms", "毫秒"):
312	        return int(n)
313	    if unit in ("s", "秒", ""):
314	        # 纯数字默认按秒? 设计文档时长模式; >100 视为毫秒, 否则秒
315	        return int(n * 1000) if (unit or n <= 60) else int(n)
316	    return int(n)
317

_**Agent - sidechain (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 15:00:20Z)**_

I now have a complete picture of the bug and the execution pipeline. Here is my full analysis.

---

## Root Cause Found: Type Mismatch in `save_raw_response` Call

The error **"data must be str, not list"** is caused by a type bug in the agent orchestration code.

### Bug Location

**File:** `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/agent.py`, line 313

```python
fm.save_raw_response(case.case_id, all_raw)
```

**Problem:** `all_raw` is a `list` of raw response strings, but `save_raw_response` expects a `str`.

In `core/agent.py` lines 285-292, `all_raw` is built as a list:

```python
all_raw: list = []
for bi, block in enumerate(exec_blocks, start=1):
    if not block.operations and not block.expectations:
        continue
    block_actions, raws = self.planner.generate_block_action(
        case, block, roles=roles, block_no=bi, total_blocks=len(exec_blocks),
    )
    all_raw.extend(raws)  # <-- raws is a list, all_raw becomes a list
```

But at line 313, the entire list is passed:

```python
fm.save_raw_response(case.case_id, all_raw)  # <-- BUG: passing list where str is expected
```

### The Receiving Method

**File:** `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/output.py`, line 49

```python
def save_raw_response(self, case_id: str, text: str) -> None:
    (self.case_dir(case_id) / "模型原始响应.txt").write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
```

Python's `Path.write_text()` internally requires a `str` argument. When it receives a `list`, it raises:
```
TypeError: data must be str, not list
```

This exception is caught by the broad `except Exception as e` at line 381 of `core/agent.py`:

```python
except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
    self.console.print(f"[red]用例执行异常: {e}[/red]")
```

That is exactly the error message seen in the specstory history files: `"用例执行异常: data must be str, not list"`.

### Historical Context

The specstory history files (e.g., `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/.specstory/history/2026-06-11_03-05-20Z-dom.md`) show that the original code used a single `raw` variable:
```python
fm.save_raw_response(case.case_id, raw)
```

When the code was refactored to support block-based planning (`generate_block_action` which returns multiple raw responses), the variable was changed to `all_raw` (a list), but the `save_raw_response` call was not updated to join the list into a string first.

---

## The Full Action Execution Pipeline

For context, here is how actions flow through the system:

### 1. Action Planning (`core/planning/action_planner.py`)
- `ActionPlanner.generate_block_actions()` is called per execution block
- Sends prompts to the LLM with system prompt from `prompts/action_plan.system.md` and user prompt from `prompts/action_plan.user.md`
- LLM returns JSON like `{"actions": [{"type": "click", "intent": "..."}, ...]}`
- Returns `(list[PlannedAction], list[raw_responses])`

### 2. Agent Orchestration (`core/agent.py`)
- `_run_one_case()` loops through execution blocks
- Calls `generate_block_action()`, collects `all_raw` responses
- Saves raw response via `fm.save_raw_response()` (where the bug is)
- Saves planned actions via `fm.save_planned_actions()`

### 3. Action Execution (`core/execution/runner.py` and `core/execution/dispatcher.py`)
- `PlaywrightRunner.run_actions()` iterates through actions
- `ActionDispatcher.dispatch()` handles each action type:
  - `click/fill/hover/press/upload` - resolved via 5-level locator chain, then executed
  - `goto/wait/assert_text/assert_table/assert_count` - direct execution
  - `api_call` - delegated to ApiRunner

### 4. Code Generation (`core/codegen.py`)
- After execution, `generate_spec()` creates a standalone Playwright Python script

---

| `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/agent.py` | Main orchestrator - **contains the bug at line 313** |

## Fix Required

In `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/agent.py` line 313, the `all_raw` list needs to be converted to a string before passing to `save_raw_response`. The fix would be something like joining all raw responses with a separator:

```python
fm.save_raw_response(case.case_id, json.dumps(all_raw, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
# or
fm.save_raw_response(case.case_id, "\n---\n".join(str(r) for r in all_raw))
```

## 失败原因分析

**错误**: `用例执行异常: data must be str, not list`

**根因定位**: `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/agent.py` 第 313 行

```python
fm.save_raw_response(case.case_id, all_raw)  # all_raw 是 list，但 save_raw_response 期望 str

**修复方案**: 将 `all_raw` 转为字符串再保存：

```python
# 修复前
fm.save_raw_response(case.case_id, all_raw)

# 修复后
fm.save_raw_response(case.case_id, "\n---\n".join(str(r) for r in all_raw))
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="Agent"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Agent**</summary>
Explore execution blocks design

```text
Here is the complete analysis of the `execution_block` / `build_execution_blocks` design.

---

## 1. Where is `build_execution_blocks` defined? What does it do?

**Location:** `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/preprocess/step_format.py`

```python
def build_execution_blocks(case: ParsedCase) -> list[ExecutionBlock]:
    """把 ParsedCase 归一成按块执行的序列 (API/前置展开步骤在最前)."""
    blocks: list[ExecutionBlock] = []

    if case.steps:
        blocks.append(ExecutionBlock(operations=list(case.steps), expectations=[]))

    if case.execution_blocks:
        blocks.extend(case.execution_blocks)
    elif case.expectations:
        blocks.append(ExecutionBlock(operations=[], expectations=list(case.expectations)))

    return blocks if blocks else [ExecutionBlock()]
```

It normalizes any `ParsedCase` into a sequence of `ExecutionBlock` objects, where each `ExecutionBlock` (defined in `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/parser/schema.py`) is:

```python
@dataclass
class ExecutionBlock:
    """一组「操作 -> 预期」: 先执行 operations, 后校验通过后再执行 expectations 对应的断言."""
    operations: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    expectations: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
```

**What it does:** It takes a parsed case (which may use either "format A" -- all steps then all expectations, or "format B" -- interleaved step/expectation blocks) and flattens them into a linear list of `ExecutionBlock` objects that the executor can iterate over uniformly.

---

## 2. Why are actions planned per block instead of all at once?

The answer lies in how `agent.py` (lines 279-398) uses the blocks:

```python
# In agent._run_one_case:
exec_blocks = build_execution_blocks(case)
for bi, block in enumerate(exec_blocks, start=1):
    block_actions, raws = self.planner.generate_block_action(
        case, block, roles=roles, block_no=bi, total_blocks=len(exec_blocks),
    )
    ...
    planned_segments.append((op_actions, assert_actions))
    actions.extend(block_actions)

# Then execute:
for seg_i, (op_actions, assert_actions) in enumerate(planned_segments, start=1):
    if op_actions:
        seg_results = runner.run_actions(op_actions, case.case_id)
        ...
        if any(r.status == "FAIL" for r in seg_results):
            self.console.print(f"块 {seg_i} 操作失败, 跳过本块后续断言")
            break          # <--- early exit: skip assertions for a failed block
    if assert_actions:
        results.extend(runner.run_actions(assert_actions, case.case_id))
```

**Design rationale:** Actions are planned per block so that:

1. **Fail-fast with block granularity.** If operations in block N fail, its corresponding assertions are skipped and execution can stop (or move on). This avoids running assertions against a known-bad state.

2. **Focused LLM prompts.** The planner (`ActionPlanner.generate_block_action` in `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/planning/action_planner.py`) sends two separate prompts per block:
   - One prompt with **only operations** (using `_BLOCK_OPS_USER` template), explicitly forbidding assert actions.
   - One prompt with **only expectations** (using `_BLOCK_ASSERT_USER` template), requiring only assert actions.

   This separation is more reliable for the LLM than asking it to plan everything at once, because each prompt has a single responsibility.

3. **Interleaved case support.** For format B cases (step-then-verify, step-then-verify), each block maps to one logical "do-and-check" cycle. Planning and executing per block mirrors the natural mental model of the test case.

---

## 3. Relationship between execution blocks and case steps (前置/操作/后校验/断言)

The `ParsedCase` data structure (`/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/parser/schema.py`) has these fields:

| Field | Semantic | Populated by |
|---|---|---|
| `preconditions` | 前置条件 | Parser (markdown header "##### 前置条件") |
| `steps` | 操作步骤 | Parser (markdown header "##### 操作步骤") |
| `expectations` | 预期结果 | Parser (markdown header "##### 预期结果") |
| `execution_blocks` | 操作步骤与预期结果 (交错) | Parser (markdown header "##### 操作步骤与预期结果") |

The relationship:

1. **Preconditions** (`preconditions`) are expanded by `PreconditionExpander` into additional items prepended to `steps`. The count is tracked in `precondition_step_count`.

2. **Format A (分离式):** The markdown file has separate "操作步骤" and "预期结果" sections. After parsing, `case.steps` and `case.expectations` are populated, but `case.execution_blocks` is empty. `build_execution_blocks` creates:
   - Block 1: `operations = case.steps`, `expectations = []`
   - Block 2: `operations = []`, `expectations = case.expectations`

3. **Format B (交错式):** The markdown file uses "操作步骤与预期结果" section with `->` arrows or nested `预期:` bullets. The parser directly populates `case.execution_blocks` as a list of `ExecutionBlock` objects. `build_execution_blocks` passes them through as-is (the operations from `case.steps` become Block 1 if present, then all interleaved blocks are appended).

4. **After `build_execution_blocks`:** The result is a linear list `[Block_1, Block_2, ...]` where every block is processed identically by the planner and executor. Each block's `operations` are planned/executed first, then its `expectations` are planned/executed as assertions.

---

## 4. How steps are classified into blocks -- the parser / preprocess logic

**In the parser** (`/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/parser/markdown_parser.py`):

The section header "操作步骤与预期结果" (or "操作步骤 & 预期结果") maps to the `"interleaved"` field. When parsing this section:

1. **Arrow format** (`操作 -> 预期`): The content is split by `->` or `->` regex. `_split_arrow_into_block()` creates one `ExecutionBlock` per line.

   ```python
   def _split_arrow_into_block(case, content):
       left, right = _ARROW_SPLIT_RE.split(content, maxsplit=1)
       op = re.sub(r"^\d+[.)]\s*", "", left).strip()
       exp = right.strip() if right else ""
       case.execution_blocks.append(
           ExecutionBlock(operations=[op] if op else [], expectations=[exp] if exp else [])
       )
   ```

2. **Nested bullet format:** A top-level list item is the operation. A sub-bullet (indent >= 2) starting with `预期:` is collected as an expectation. When a new operation appears, the previous operation+expectations are flushed into an `ExecutionBlock`.

   ```python
   # In _append_interleaved:
   if indent >= 2 and _EXPECT_PREFIX_RE.match(content):
       # This is "预期：xxx" sub-bullet -> collect
       state.pending_exps.append(exp)
   else:
       state.flush(case)       # save previous block
       state.pending_op = new_operation  # start new block
   ```

3. **When leaving the interleaved section** (e.g. encountering a new section header or new case), `flush_interleaved()` saves the last pending block.

**In `build_execution_blocks`** (`step_format.py`):

This is the final normalization that merges everything:

```python
# Step 1: if there are plain steps, make them the first block (operations only)
if case.steps:
    blocks.append(ExecutionBlock(operations=list(case.steps), expectations=[]))

# Step 2: if there are pre-parsed interleaved blocks, append them;
#         otherwise if there are plain expectations, make a assertions-only block
if case.execution_blocks:
    blocks.extend(case.execution_blocks)
elif case.expectations:
    blocks.append(ExecutionBlock(operations=[], expectations=list(case.expectations)))
```

This means the final execution sequence is:

- **Block 1** (if steps exist): all operations from `case.steps` (including expanded preconditions)
- **Block 2, 3, ...** (if interleaved): each interleaved (operation + expectation) pair
- **Final block** (if format A with expectations only): all expectations as assertions

**Helper function:**

```python
def is_interleaved_case(case: ParsedCase) -> bool:
    """是否为交错编排 (每步操作后紧跟断言)."""
    if case.execution_blocks:
        return True
    return any(_ARROW_RE.search(s) for s in case.steps)
```

---

## Summary of Key Files

| File | Role |
|---|---|
| `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/parser/schema.py` | Defines `ExecutionBlock` and `ParsedCase` data structures |
| `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/parser/markdown_parser.py` | Parses markdown into `ParsedCase`, populating `execution_blocks` for interleaved format |
| `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/preprocess/step_format.py` | `build_execution_blocks()` -- normalizes any case format into a list of `ExecutionBlock` |
| `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/planning/action_planner.py` | `generate_block_action()` -- plans operations and assertions separately per block |
| `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/agent.py` | Orchestrator -- iterates blocks, plans each, executes operations then assertions, with fail-fast |
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./core/preprocess/step_format.py`

```text
1	"""用例编排格式归一 —— 支持分离式与交错式两种步骤/断言结构.
2	
3	格式 A (分离): 全部操作步骤 → 全部预期结果
4	格式 B (交错): 每步操作后立即跟对应预期 (解析为 execution_blocks)
5	"""
6	from __future__ import annotations
7	
8	import re
9	
10	from ..parser import ExecutionBlock, ParsedCase
11	
12	_ARROW_RE = re.compile(r"\s*(?:->|→)\s*")
13	
14	
15	def build_execution_blocks(case: ParsedCase) -> list[ExecutionBlock]:
16	    """把 ParsedCase 归一成按块执行的序列 (API/前置展开步骤在最前)."""
17	    blocks: list[ExecutionBlock] = []
18	
19	    if case.steps:
20	        blocks.append(ExecutionBlock(operations=list(case.steps), expectations=[]))
21	
22	    if case.execution_blocks:
23	        blocks.extend(case.execution_blocks)
24	    elif case.expectations:
25	        blocks.append(ExecutionBlock(operations=[], expectations=list(case.expectations)))
26	
27	    return blocks if blocks else [ExecutionBlock()]
28	
29	
30	def is_interleaved_case(case: ParsedCase) -> bool:
31	    """是否为交错编排 (每步操作后紧跟断言)."""
32	    if case.execution_blocks:
33	        return True
34	    return any(_ARROW_RE.search(s) for s in case.steps)
35
```
</details></tool-use>

1	"""步骤⑮ 核心编排器 UITestAgent —— 系统总指挥.
2	
3	run_tests(测试文件):
4	  解析 → 排序 → (每条用例) 前置展开 → 登录 → 导航 → 动作规划 → 意图拆分
5	  → 执行编排器 → 判定 → 关闭浏览器 → 汇总.
6	"""
7	from __future__ import annotations
8	
9	from pathlib import Path
10	from typing import Any, Optional
11	
12	from rich.console import Console
13	from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
14	
15	from . import codegen
16	from .api_client import APIClient
17	from .api_runner import ApiRunner
18	from .business_loader import BusinessLoader

20	from .execution.trace import ExecutionTrace

26	    SelectorMemory, StructureLearner,
27	)

31	from .planning import ActionPlanner, IntentSplitter, strip_duplicate_menu_clicks
32	from .preprocess import PreconditionExpander, sort_cases
33	from .preprocess.step_format import build_execution_blocks
34	from .profile import ProfileManager
35	from .readiness import ReadinessChecker

41	
42	class UITestAgent:
43	    def __init__(self, config: dict[str, Any], project_root: str | Path) -> None:
44	        self.config = config
45	        self.root = Path(project_root)
46	        self.console = Console()
47	
48	        llm_cfg = config["llm"]
49	        # 步骤⑲ 可观测性: 当前用例的收集器, LLM 调用经 _route_llm 归集
50	        self._cur_obs: Optional[ObservabilityCollector] = None
51	        self.llm = LLMAdapter(llm_cfg, observe=self._route_llm)
52	        self.prompts = PromptLoader(self.root / "prompts", llm_cfg.get("prompts"))
53	
54	        # 步骤㉒ 技能知识注入动作规划
55	        skill_text = load_skill_text(self.root / "prompts" / "skill.md")
56	        self.precondition = PreconditionExpander(self.llm, self.prompts)
57	        self.planner = ActionPlanner(self.llm, self.prompts, skill_text=skill_text)
58	        self.splitter = IntentSplitter(self.llm, self.prompts)
59	        self.navigator = Navigator(self.console)
60	        # 步骤⑳ 资源管理
61	        self.resources = ResourceManager(self.root)
62	
63	        self.target = config.get("target", {})
64	        self.pw_cfg = config.get("playwright", {})
65	        self.runner_cfg = config.get("runner", {})
66	
67	        # 【多系统扩展】Profile 管理器
68	        self.profile_mgr = ProfileManager(config)
69	
70	        # 步骤⑨ 智能加速层 (批次内共享并持久化)
71	        accel = self.root / "智能加速"
72	        self.cache = SelectorCache(accel / "选择器缓存.json")
73	        self.memory = SelectorMemory(accel / "选择器记忆库.json")
74	        self.learner = StructureLearner(accel / "页面结构学习.json")
75	        self.rule_engine = RuleEngine()
76	        self.decider = LLMElementDecider(self.llm, self.prompts)
77	        self.resolver = LocatorResolver(
78	            self.decider, cache=self.cache, memory=self.memory,
79	            rule_engine=self.rule_engine, learner=self.learner, console=self.console,
80	        )
81	        # 步骤⑩⑫ 可靠性组件
82	        self.readiness = ReadinessChecker(self.llm, self.prompts)
83	        self.post_checker = PostStepChecker(self.llm, self.prompts)
84	
85	    def _route_llm(self, stage: str, system: str, user: str, raw: str) -> None:
86	        """步骤⑲: 把 LLM 调用归集到当前用例的可观测性收集器."""
87	        if self._cur_obs is not None:
88	            self._cur_obs.on_llm_call(stage, system, user, raw)
89	
90	    def _inject_business(self, biz: BusinessLoader) -> None:
91	        """把业务目录的配置注入到 ProfileManager 中."""
92	        from .profile import SessionConfig
93	
94	        base_url = biz.get_base_url()
95	        roles = biz.get_roles()
96	        if biz.project_dir:
97	            self.profile_mgr.sessions[biz.project_dir.name] = SessionConfig(
98	                name=biz.project_dir.name,
99	                target_system=biz.system_dir.name,
100	                roles=roles,
101	            )
102	        if base_url or biz.get_apis() or biz.get_enums():
103	            self.profile_mgr.profiles[biz.system_dir.name] = biz.build_system_profile()
104	
105	    def run_tests(self, test_file: str | Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
106	        # 【业务目录】从用例路径向上自动发现业务配置
107	        biz = BusinessLoader()
108	        biz_loaded = biz.discover(test_file)
109	        if biz_loaded:
110	            self.console.print(f"[cyan]业务: {biz.system_dir.name} | 项目: {biz.project_dir.name}[/cyan]")
111	            # 注入业务知识到 ProfileManager
112	            self._inject_business(biz)
113	
114	        cases = parse_case(test_file)
115	        if not cases:
116	            raise ValueError(f"用例文件未解析出任何用例: {test_file}")
117	        cases = sort_cases(cases, self.llm, self.prompts,
118	                           use_llm=self.runner_cfg.get("case_sort_llm", len(cases) > 1))
119	
120	        # 让所有用例继承系统名 (用于兜底账号回退)
121	        if biz_loaded:
122	            for case in cases:
123	                if not case.target_system:
124	                    case.target_system = biz.system_dir.name
125	
126	        fm = FileManager(self.root)
127	        self.console.print(f"[cyan]批次目录: {fm.batch_dir}[/cyan]")
128	
129	        case_results = []
130	        with sync_playwright() as p:
131	            browser_type = getattr(p, self.pw_cfg.get("browser", "chromium"))
132	            browser = browser_type.launch(headless=self.pw_cfg.get("headless", False))
133	            try:
134	                for case in cases:
135	                    case_results.append(self._run_one_case(case, browser, fm, biz=biz, case_file=test_file))
136	                    # 每个 case 完成后立即保存, 避免中途异常丢失学习成果
137	                    self.cache.save()
138	                    self.memory.save()
139	                    self.learner.save()
140	            finally:
141	                browser.close()
142	
143	        # 持久化智能加速层
144	        self.cache.save()
145	        self.memory.save()
146	        self.learner.save()
147	
148	        passed = sum(1 for r in case_results if r["passed"])
149	        failed = len(case_results) - passed
150	        summary = {
151	            "总数": len(case_results),
152	            "通过数": passed,
153	            "失败数": failed,
154	            "批次目录": str(fm.batch_dir),
155	            "用例结果": case_results,
156	        }
157	        self.console.rule("[bold]汇总")
158	        self.console.print(f"总数 {summary['总数']}  通过 {passed}  失败 {failed}")
159	        return summary
160	
161	    def _run_one_case(
162	        self, case, browser, fm: FileManager, biz: BusinessLoader = None, case_file: str | Path = "",
163	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
164	        self.console.rule(f"[bold cyan]用例 {case.case_id}")
165	
166	        # 步骤⑲ 每条用例独立的可观测性收集器
167	        obs = ObservabilityCollector()
168	        self._cur_obs = obs
169	
170	        # 【多系统扩展】解析 profile + session
171	        profile, session = self.profile_mgr.resolve(case)
172	        self.console.print(f"[dim]系统: {profile.name} | 项目: {session.name or 'default'} | 角色: {case.role or '-'}[/dim]")
173	
174	        # 登录页配置 (业务知识中的 login_page + 项目配置的 base_url)
175	        login_cfg = dict(base_url=biz.get_base_url() if biz else profile.base_url)
176	        if biz:
177	            login_cfg.update(biz.get_login_page())
178	
179	        # 【前置条件分流】按 API 关键词把前置条件分成两堆:
180	        # - API 类 (含"投放"等) → 转为 api_call 动作, 插入步骤最前
181	        # - 普通前置 (如"已有收货地址") → 保留给旧版 LLM 文本展开
182	        context: dict = {}
183	        api_runner_for_dispatch: Optional[ApiRunner] = None
184	        if profile.apis and case.preconditions:
185	            api_keywords = []
186	            for tpl in profile.apis.values():
187	                api_keywords.extend(tpl.keywords)
188	
189	            api_preconditions = []
190	            normal_preconditions = []
191	            for p in case.preconditions:
192	                if any(kw in p for kw in api_keywords):
193	                    api_preconditions.append(p)
194	                else:
195	                    normal_preconditions.append(p)
196	
197	            if api_preconditions:
198	                try:
199	                    api_client = APIClient(profile)
200	                    api_runner_for_dispatch = ApiRunner(api_client, profile)
201	                    # API 前置条件转为 api_call 动作, 插入步骤最前
202	                    case.steps = list(api_preconditions) + case.steps
203	                except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
204	                    self.console.print(f"[yellow]API 前置准备失败: {e} (继续执行)[/yellow]")
205	
206	            # 普通前置保留给旧版 LLM 文本展开
207	            case.preconditions = normal_preconditions
208	
209	        # 【多系统扩展】变量替换: 步骤和预期中的 ${var}
210	        if context:
211	            case.steps = substitute_in_list(case.steps, context)
212	            case.expectations = substitute_in_list(case.expectations, context)
213	
214	        # 步骤② 前置条件展开 (旧模式: LLM 文本展开, 仅在没有 API 前置时执行)
215	        trace = ExecutionTrace(
216	            self.console,
217	            enabled=self.runner_cfg.get("verbose_trace", True),
218	        )
219	        self.precondition.expand(case)
220	        trace.emit(
221	            "precondition",
222	            added=case.precondition_step_count,
223	            steps=case.steps,
224	        )
225	        fm.save_parsed_case(case.case_id, case)
226	
227	        # 浏览器上下文 (按角色隔离, 支持用例内角色切换)
228	        role_contexts: dict[str, Any] = {}  # role → (context, page)
229	        default_timeout = self.pw_cfg.get("default_timeout_ms", 10000)
230	
231	        def _get_page_for_role(role: str) -> Any:
232	            """获取或创建角色对应的浏览器页面并登录."""
233	            if role in role_contexts:
234	                return role_contexts[role][1]
235	            ctx = browser.new_context(viewport=self.pw_cfg.get("viewport"))
236	            pg = ctx.new_page()
237	            pg.set_default_timeout(default_timeout)
238	            username, credential = self.profile_mgr.get_credentials(session, role)
239	            is_verify_code = credential.isdigit() and len(credential) <= 6
240	            login_kwargs = dict(login_cfg)
241	            login_kwargs["username"] = username
242	            self.console.print(f"  [dim]登录配置: base_url={login_kwargs.get('base_url')}, login_url={login_kwargs.get('login_url')}[/dim]")
243	            if is_verify_code:
244	                login(pg, login_kwargs, force=True, verify_code=credential)
245	            else:
246	                login_kwargs["password"] = credential
247	                login(pg, login_kwargs, force=True)
248	            self.console.print(f"[dim]登录完成 role={role} url={pg.url}[/dim]")
249	            role_contexts[role] = (ctx, pg)
250	            return pg
251	
252	        # 第一个角色作为主页面
253	        role_keys = list(session.roles.keys()) if session.roles else []
254	        first_role = role_keys[0] if role_keys else None
255	        if first_role:
256	            page = _get_page_for_role(first_role)
257	        else:
258	            context_browser = browser.new_context(viewport=self.pw_cfg.get("viewport"))
259	            page = context_browser.new_page()
260	            page.set_default_timeout(default_timeout)
261	            page = login(page, self.target, force=True)
262	
263	        passed = False
264	        try:
265	            # 【多系统扩展】步骤④ 登录 (带角色)
266	            # 有 session.roles 时已在 _get_page_for_role(first_role) 用业务 base_url 登录;
267	            # case.role 为空时切勿 fallback 到 config.yaml 的 self.target (会跳到商城).
268	            if session.roles:
269	                if case.role and case.role != first_role:
270	                    page = _get_page_for_role(case.role)
271	            elif first_role is None:
272	                # 无业务角色: 256-260 已用 self.target 登录
273	                pass
274	
275	            # 步骤⑤ 导航
276	            page = self.navigator.navigate(page, case.module_path,
277	                                           self.pw_cfg.get("default_timeout_ms", 10000))
278	
279	            actions: list = []
280	            planned_segments: list[tuple[list, list]] = []
281	            # 步骤⑥ 动作规划 (按执行块: 操作→后校验→断言)
282	            roles = list(session.roles.keys()) if session.roles else None
283	            exec_blocks = build_execution_blocks(case)
284	            import json as _json
285	            all_raw: list = []
286	            for bi, block in enumerate(exec_blocks, start=1):
287	                if not block.operations and not block.expectations:
288	                    continue
289	                block_actions, raws = self.planner.generate_block_actions(
290	                    case, block, roles=roles, block_no=bi, total_blocks=len(exec_blocks),
291	                )
292	                all_raw.extend(raws)
293	                before_split = len(block_actions)
294	                block_actions = self.splitter.split_all(block_actions)
295	                block_actions = strip_duplicate_menu_clicks(block_actions, case.module_path)
296	                op_actions = [a for a in block_actions if not a.is_assert()]
297	                assert_actions = [a for a in block_actions if a.is_assert()]
298	                planned_segments.append((op_actions, assert_actions))
299	                actions.extend(block_actions)
300	                self.console.print(
301	                    f"  [dim]块 {bi}/{len(exec_blocks)}: "
302	                    f"操作 {len(op_actions)} 断言 {len(assert_actions)}[/dim]"
303	                )
304	            trace.emit(
305	                "action_plan",
306	                count=len(actions),
307	                actions=ExecutionTrace.summarize_actions(actions),
308	            )
309	            if all_raw:
310	                merged_raw = _json.dumps(
311	                    [r for r in all_raw], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2
312	                )
313	                self.console.print(
314	                    f"  [dim]└─ 规划原始 JSON (共 {len(all_raw)} 块): "
315	                    f"{merged_raw[:800]}{'...' if len(merged_raw) > 800 else ''}[/dim]"
316	                )
317	            fm.save_raw_response(case.case_id, "\n---\n".join(str(r) for r in all_raw))
318	            fm.save_prompt(case.case_id, self._dump_prompt(case, exec_blocks))
319	            trace.emit(
320	                "intent_split",
321	                before=len(actions),
322	                after=len(actions),
323	                split_count=0,
324	                actions=ExecutionTrace.summarize_actions(actions),
325	            )
326	            fm.save_planned_actions(case.case_id, actions)
327	
328	            # 动作规划后再确定主角色, 避免一律用 roles 里第一个账号(常为 admin)登录
329	            from .planning.role_infer import infer_primary_role
330	            primary_role = infer_primary_role(case, actions, role_keys)
331	            if primary_role:
332	                case.role = primary_role
333	                self.console.print(f"[dim]推断执行角色: {primary_role}[/dim]")
334	                if session.roles and primary_role != first_role:
335	                    page = _get_page_for_role(primary_role)
336	                    self.console.print(f"  [cyan]↻ 切换至用例主角色 → {primary_role}[/cyan]")
337	
338	            if not actions:
339	                self.console.print("[yellow]规划结果为空, 跳过执行[/yellow]")
340	                return {"case_id": case.case_id, "passed": False, "reason": "无动作"}
341	
342	            # 步骤⑨⑪⑫⑬⑭ 定位 + 分发 + 后校验重试 + 执行编排
343	            self.resolver.set_trace(trace)
344	            dispatcher = ActionDispatcher(
345	                page, self.resolver,
346	                self.pw_cfg.get("default_timeout_ms", 10000),
347	                trace=trace,
348	            )
349	            retry_ctrl = RetryController(
350	                dispatcher, self.post_checker, self.resolver, console=self.console,
351	                max_retries=self.runner_cfg.get("post_step_max_retries", 5),
352	                trace=trace,
353	            )
354	            runner = PlaywrightRunner(
355	                dispatcher,
356	                out_dir=fm.case_dir(case.case_id),
357	                console=self.console,
358	                screenshot_on_failure=self.runner_cfg.get("screenshot_on_failure", True),
359	                readiness_checker=self.readiness,
360	                retry_controller=retry_ctrl,
361	                pre_readiness_check=self.runner_cfg.get("pre_readiness_check", False),
362	                post_step_check=self.runner_cfg.get("post_step_check", False),
363	                observability=obs,
364	                trace=trace,
365	                page_switcher=_get_page_for_role if session.roles else None,
366	                api_runner=api_runner_for_dispatch,
367	            )
368	            results: list = []
369	            for seg_i, (op_actions, assert_actions) in enumerate(planned_segments, start=1):
370	                if op_actions:
371	                    self.console.print(
372	                        f"[blue]▶ 执行块 {seg_i} — 操作 ({len(op_actions)} 步, 含后校验)[/blue]"
373	                    )
374	                    seg_results = runner.run_actions(op_actions, case.case_id)
375	                    results.extend(seg_results)
376	                    if seg_results and any(r.status == "FAIL" for r in seg_results):
377	                        self.console.print(f"  [red]块 {seg_i} 操作失败, 跳过本块后续断言[/red]")
378	                        break
379	                if assert_actions:
380	                    self.console.print(
381	                        f"[blue]▶ 执行块 {seg_i} — 断言 ({len(assert_actions)} 步)[/blue]"
382	                    )
383	                    results.extend(runner.run_actions(assert_actions, case.case_id))
384	            passed = bool(results) and all(r.status == "PASS" for r in results)
385	        except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
386	            self.console.print(f"[red]用例执行异常: {e}[/red]")
387	        finally:
388	            # 关闭所有角色的浏览器上下文
389	            for ctx, pg in role_contexts.values():
390	                try:
391	                    pg.close()
392	                except Exception:
393	                    pass
394	                try:
395	                    ctx.close()
396	                except Exception:
397	                    pass
398	            # 步骤⑲ 可观测性落盘 + 步骤⑳ 临时资源清理
399	            cd = fm.case_dir(case.case_id)
400	            obs.save(cd / "可观测性.json")
401	            trace.save(cd / "执行追踪.json")
402	            self._cur_obs = None
403	            self.resources.cleanup()
404	
405	        # 步骤㉑ 生成可独立运行的 Playwright Python 脚本
406	        codegen_login = dict(login_cfg)
407	        login_role = case.role or (list(session.roles.keys())[0] if session.roles else None)
408	        if login_role and session.roles:
409	            uname, cred = self.profile_mgr.get_credentials(session, login_role)
410	            codegen_login["username"] = uname
411	            if cred.isdigit() and len(cred) <= 6:
412	                codegen_login["verify_code"] = cred
413	            else:
414	                codegen_login["password"] = cred
415	        api_ctx: dict = {}
416	        try:
417	            api_ctx = dict(dispatcher.api_context)
418	        except NameError:
419	            if api_runner_for_dispatch:
420	                api_ctx = dict(api_runner_for_dispatch.context)
421	        spec_path = codegen.generate_spec(
422	            case.case_id, actions,
423	            profile.base_url,
424	            out_dir=fm.case_dir(case.case_id),
425	            login_config=codegen_login,
426	            api_context=api_ctx,
427	            project_root=self.root,
428	            case_file=case_file,
429	        )
430	
431	        return {"case_id": case.case_id, "passed": passed}
432	
433	    def _dump_prompt(self, case, exec_blocks=None) -> str:
434	        blocks = exec_blocks or build_execution_blocks(case)
435	        blocks_text = ""
436	        for i, b in enumerate(blocks, start=1):
437	            ops = "\n".join(f"  {j + 1}. {s}" for j, s in enumerate(b.operations)) or "  (无)"
438	            exps = "\n".join(f"  {j + 1}. {e}" for j, e in enumerate(b.expectations)) or "  (无)"
439	            blocks_text += f"\n### 块 {i}\n操作:\n{ops}\n预期:\n{exps}\n"
440	        return (
441	            f"# 用例 {case.case_id}\n\n"
442	            f"模块路径: {' / '.join(case.module_path)}\n"
443	            f"前置展开步骤数: {case.precondition_step_count}\n\n"
444	            f"## 系统提示词 (动作规划)\n\n```\n{self.prompts.system('action_plan')}\n```\n\n"
445	            f"## 执行块\n{blocks_text}\n"
446	        )
447

1	"""步骤① 解析器 —— Markdown 用例解析.
2	
3	按标题层级提取:
4	  #     一级模块 → module_path[0]
5	  ##    二级模块 → module_path[1]
6	  ###   三级模块 → module_path[2]
7	  ####  用例ID：XXX → 新用例开始
8	  ##### 优先级 / 前置条件 / 操作步骤 / 预期结果 / 操作步骤与预期结果 / 资源定义 / 用例依赖
9	
10	列表项支持 `1. xxx` 与 `- xxx`. 没有标题时以文件名兜底作为模块路径.
11	资源定义从 ```yaml 块解析, source ∈ 资产/上传/本地, filename 必须存在.
12	
13	用例编排支持两种格式:
14	  A) 操作步骤段 + 预期结果段 (先全部步骤, 后全部断言)
15	  B) 操作步骤与预期结果段 (每步操作后立即跟对应预期, 含 `->` 或子 bullet `预期:`)
16	"""
17	from __future__ import annotations
18	
19	import re
20	from pathlib import Path
21	from typing import Optional
22	
23	import yaml
24	
25	from .schema import CaseResource, ExecutionBlock, ParsedCase
26	
27	# 段标题归一: 较长键优先匹配 (操作步骤与预期结果 先于 操作步骤)
28	_SECTION_ALIASES: list[tuple[str, str]] = [
29	    ("操作步骤与预期结果", "interleaved"),
30	    ("操作步骤 & 预期结果", "interleaved"),
31	    ("操作步骤", "steps"),
32	    ("步骤", "steps"),
33	    ("预期结果", "expectations"),
34	    ("预期", "expectations"),
35	    ("前置条件", "preconditions"),
36	    ("优先级", "priority"),
37	    ("验证点", "notes"),
38	    ("资源定义", "resources"),
39	    ("资源", "resources"),
40	    ("用例依赖", "dependencies"),
41	    ("依赖", "dependencies"),
42	    ("备注", "notes"),
43	    ("目标系统", "target_system"),
44	    ("测试项目", "session_name"),
45	    ("使用角色", "role"),
46	]
47	
48	_HEADING_RE = re.compile(r"^(#{1,6})\s+(.*)$")
49	_LIST_ITEM_RE = re.compile(r"^(\s*)(?:\d+[.)]|[-*])\s+(.*)$")
50	_CASE_ID_RE = re.compile(r"用例\s*ID\s*[:：]\s*(.+)$")
51	_ARROW_SPLIT_RE = re.compile(r"\s*(?:->|→)\s*")
52	_EXPECT_PREFIX_RE = re.compile(r"^预期[:：]\s*")
53	_INTERLEAVED_NOISE_RE = re.compile(
54	    r"^【?操作步骤.*?】?\s*[-=]?\s*>\s*【?预期",
55	    re.IGNORECASE,
56	)
57	
58	
59	class _InterleavedState:
60	    """解析「操作步骤与预期结果」段时的暂存."""
61	
62	    def __init__(self) -> None:
63	        self.pending_op: Optional[str] = None
64	        self.pending_exps: list[str] = []
65	
66	    def flush(self, case: ParsedCase) -> None:
67	        if not self.pending_op and not self.pending_exps:
68	            return
69	        case.execution_blocks.append(
70	            ExecutionBlock(
71	                operations=[self.pending_op] if self.pending_op else [],
72	                expectations=list(self.pending_exps),
73	            )
74	        )
75	        self.pending_op = None
76	        self.pending_exps = []
77	
78	    def reset(self) -> None:
79	        self.pending_op = None
80	        self.pending_exps = []
81	
82	
83	def parse_markdown(path: str | Path) -> list[ParsedCase]:
84	    """把一个 Markdown 用例文件解析成结构化 ParsedCase 列表."""
85	    p = Path(path)
86	    text = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
87	    lines = text.splitlines()
88	
89	    module_path: list[str] = []
90	    cases: list[ParsedCase] = []
91	    cur: Optional[ParsedCase] = None
92	    cur_section: Optional[str] = None
93	    in_code = False
94	    code_lang = ""
95	    code_buf: list[str] = []
96	    interleaved = _InterleavedState()
97	
98	    file_session = ""
99	    file_role = ""
100	
101	    def flush_code() -> None:
102	        nonlocal code_buf, code_lang
103	        if cur is not None and cur_section == "resources" and code_lang.lower() in ("yaml", "yml", ""):
104	            _parse_resource_yaml("\n".join(code_buf), cur)
105	        code_buf = []
106	        code_lang = ""
107	
108	    def flush_interleaved() -> None:
109	        if cur is not None and cur_section == "interleaved":
110	            interleaved.flush(cur)
111	
112	    def on_section_change(new_section: Optional[str]) -> None:
113	        nonlocal cur_section
114	        if cur_section == "interleaved":
115	            flush_interleaved()
116	        interleaved.reset()
117	        cur_section = new_section
118	
119	    def on_new_case(new_case: ParsedCase) -> None:
120	        flush_interleaved()
121	        interleaved.reset()
122	
123	    for raw in lines:
124	        fence = raw.lstrip()
125	        if fence.startswith("```"):
126	            if not in_code:
127	                in_code = True
128	                code_lang = fence[3:].strip()
129	                code_buf = []
130	            else:
131	                in_code = False
132	                flush_code()
133	            continue
134	        if in_code:
135	            code_buf.append(raw)
136	            continue
137	
138	        m = _HEADING_RE.match(raw)
139	        if m:
140	            level = len(m.group(1))
141	            title = m.group(2).strip()
142	            if level <= 3:
143	                flush_interleaved()
144	                module_path = module_path[: level - 1]
145	                module_path.append(title)
146	                cur = None
147	                on_section_change(None)
148	            elif level == 4:
149	                flush_interleaved()
150	                cid = _extract_case_id(title)
151	                cur = ParsedCase(case_id=cid, module_path=list(module_path), source_path=p)
152	                if file_session and not cur.session_name:
153	                    cur.session_name = file_session
154	                if file_role and not cur.role:
155	                    cur.role = file_role
156	                cases.append(cur)
157	                on_new_case(cur)
158	                on_section_change(None)
159	            else:
160	                new_sec = _resolve_section(title)
161	                on_section_change(new_sec)
162	                if cur is not None and cur_section == "priority":
163	                    inline = _strip_section_label(title)
164	                    if inline:
165	                        cur.priority = inline
166	            continue
167	
168	        if cur is None or cur_section is None:
169	            line_content = raw.strip()
170	            if cur is None and cur_section == "session_name" and line_content and line_content != "---":
171	                file_session = line_content
172	            elif cur is None and cur_section == "role" and line_content and line_content != "---":
173	                file_role = line_content
174	            continue
175	
176	        if cur_section == "interleaved":
177	            _append_interleaved(cur, interleaved, raw)
178	            continue
179	
180	        item = _LIST_ITEM_RE.match(raw)
181	        content = item.group(2).strip() if item else raw.strip()
182	        if not content or content in ("---", "***", "___"):
183	            continue
184	        if cur_section == "steps" and _ARROW_SPLIT_RE.search(content):
185	            _append_arrow_step(cur, content)
186	            continue
187	        _append_section(cur, cur_section, content)
188	
189	    flush_interleaved()
190	    return cases
191	
192	
193	def _append_interleaved(case: ParsedCase, state: _InterleavedState, raw: str) -> None:
194	    item = _LIST_ITEM_RE.match(raw)
195	    if not item:
196	        stripped = raw.strip()
197	        if stripped and not _INTERLEAVED_NOISE_RE.search(stripped):
198	            if _ARROW_SPLIT_RE.search(stripped):
199	                state.flush(case)
200	                _split_arrow_into_block(case, stripped)
201	            return
202	        return
203	
204	    indent, content = len(item.group(1)), item.group(2).strip()
205	    if not content or _INTERLEAVED_NOISE_RE.search(content):
206	        return
207	
208	    if indent >= 2 and _EXPECT_PREFIX_RE.match(content):
209	        exp = _EXPECT_PREFIX_RE.sub("", content).strip()
210	        if exp:
211	            state.pending_exps.append(exp)
212	        return
213	
214	    if _ARROW_SPLIT_RE.search(content):
215	        state.flush(case)
216	        _split_arrow_into_block(case, content)
217	        return
218	
219	    state.flush(case)
220	    state.pending_op = re.sub(r"^\d+[.)]\s*", "", content).strip()
221	
222	
223	def _split_arrow_into_block(case: ParsedCase, content: str) -> None:
224	    left, right = _ARROW_SPLIT_RE.split(content, maxsplit=1)
225	    op = re.sub(r"^\d+[.)]\s*", "", left).strip()
226	    exp = right.strip() if right else ""
227	    case.execution_blocks.append(
228	        ExecutionBlock(
229	            operations=[op] if op else [],
230	            expectations=[exp] if exp else [],
231	        )
232	    )
233	
234	
235	def _append_arrow_step(case: ParsedCase, content: str) -> None:
236	    """操作步骤段内联 `->` 也按交错块解析."""
237	    _split_arrow_into_block(case, content)
238	
239	
240	def _extract_case_id(title: str) -> str:
241	    m = _CASE_ID_RE.search(title)
242	    if m:
243	        return m.group(1).strip()
244	    return title.strip()
245	
246	
247	def _resolve_section(title: str) -> Optional[str]:
248	    cleaned = re.sub(r"^\d+[.)]\s*", "", title).strip()
249	    for key, field in _SECTION_ALIASES:
250	        if cleaned.startswith(key):
251	            return field
252	    return None
253	
254	
255	def _strip_section_label(title: str) -> str:
256	    cleaned = re.sub(r"^\d+[.)]\s*", "", title).strip()
257	    for key, _ in _SECTION_ALIASES:
258	        if cleaned.startswith(key):
259	            return cleaned[len(key):].strip(" :：")
260	    return ""
261	
262	
263	def _append_section(case: ParsedCase, section: str, content: str) -> None:
264	    if section == "priority":
265	        if not case.priority:
266	            case.priority = content
267	    elif section == "preconditions":
268	        case.preconditions.append(content)
269	    elif section == "steps":
270	        case.steps.append(content)
271	    elif section == "expectations":
272	        case.expectations.append(content)
273	    elif section == "dependencies":
274	        case.dependencies.append(content)
275	    elif section == "notes":
276	        case.notes.append(content)
277	    elif section == "target_system":
278	        if not case.target_system:
279	            case.target_system = content
280	    elif section == "session_name":
281	        if not case.session_name:
282	            case.session_name = content
283	    elif section == "role":
284	        if not case.role:
285	            case.role = content
286	
287	
288	def _parse_resource_yaml(block: str, case: ParsedCase) -> None:
289	    try:
290	        data = yaml.safe_load(block)
291	    except Exception:
292	        return
293	    if not isinstance(data, dict):
294	        return
295	    for name, spec in data.items():
296	        if not isinstance(spec, dict):
297	            continue
298	        source = str(spec.get("来源") or spec.get("source") or "").strip()
299	        filename = str(spec.get("文件名") or spec.get("filename") or "").strip()
300	        if source not in ("资产", "上传", "本地"):
301	            raise ValueError(f"资源 {name} 的来源必须是 资产/上传/本地, 实际: {source!r}")
302	        if not filename:
303	            raise ValueError(f"资源 {name} 缺少文件名")
304	        case.resources[str(name)] = CaseResource(name=str(name), source=source, filename=filename)
305
```

```text
1	"""步骤⑥ 动作规划 —— 大模型把 步骤+预期 翻译成 {类型, 意图, 值} 结构化动作.
2	
3	核心规则 (见 prompts/action_plan.system.md):
4	  - 只输出 JSON; 每个动作只含 类型 + 意图, 禁止任何选择器
5	  - 每个意图只含一个原子操作
6	  - 先输出操作步骤动作, 再输出预期断言动作
7	  - "xxx成功"类预期 → 否定断言 (验证不存在 "xxx失败")
8	  - 仅当步骤明确要求等待/按键时才生成 wait/press
9	技能知识注入到系统提示词.
10	"""
11	from __future__ import annotations
12	
13	from typing import Any, Optional
14	
15	from ..llm import LLMAdapter, PromptLoader
16	from ..parser import ExecutionBlock, ParsedCase
17	from .action_schema import PlannedAction, coerce_action
18	
19	_DEFAULT_SYSTEM = """\
20	你是"动作规划器", 只负责规划"做什么", 不负责"怎么定位元素".
21	
22	输出规则:
23	1. 只输出纯 JSON 对象, 形如 {"actions": [ {...}, {...} ]}, 禁止任何其他内容.
24	2. 每个动作只含 type 和 intent (可选 value/negate), 绝对禁止输出 CSS/XPath/选择器.
25	3. 每个 intent 只含一个原子操作 —— "点击A之后再点击B" 必须拆成两条.
26	4. 顺序: 先按顺序输出所有操作步骤对应的动作, 再按顺序输出所有预期结果对应的断言动作.
27	5. 导航由系统统一完成, 不要生成进入菜单/模块的导航点击动作.
28	6. "xxx成功" 类预期 → 改为否定断言: type=assert_text, value 取对应 "xxx失败" 文案, negate=true.
29	7. 输入动作: intent 要保留场景上下文 (如 "在弹窗中的收件人输入框输入张三"); value 为输入内容.
30	8. 上传动作 type=upload, extras.field 指定输入项字段名.
31	9. 不要假设具体组件库, 用语义化中文描述意图.
32	10. 仅当步骤明确写"等待"时才生成 type=wait; 仅当明确写"按下/回车"等才生成 type=press.
33	11. JSON 字符串值(intent/value)内严禁出现未转义的英文双引号 "; 需要引用文字时改用中文全角引号 “” 或省略引号. 这能避免 JSON 解析失败.
34	
35	type 取值: click 点击 / hover 悬停 / fill 输入 / press 按键 / goto 跳转 / wait 等待 /
36	upload 上传 / assert_text 断言文本 / assert_count 断言计数 / assert_table 断言表格 / asset 资产.
37	
38	断言:
39	- "页面包含/出现 X" → {"type":"assert_text","value":"X","negate":false}
40	- "页面不包含/无 X"  → {"type":"assert_text","value":"X","negate":true}
41	- "X 不可见/隐藏"    → {"type":"assert_text","value":"X","negate":true}
42	- "X 不包含 Y"       → {"type":"assert_text","intent":"在X区域内验证不包含Y","value":"Y","negate":true}
43	"""
44	
45	_DEFAULT_USER = """\
46	模块路径: {{module_path}}
47	前 {{pre_count}} 条操作步骤由前置条件解析得到, 必须保持顺序.
48	
49	操作步骤:
50	{{steps}}
51	
52	预期结果:
53	{{expectations}}
54	
55	请输出 {"actions": [...]} JSON."""
56	
57	_BLOCK_OPS_USER = """\
58	模块路径: {{module_path}}
59	执行块: 第 {{block_no}} / {{total_blocks}} (仅操作, 本块后将有对应断言)
60	前 {{pre_count}} 条操作步骤由前置条件解析得到, 必须保持顺序.
61	
62	操作步骤:
63	{{steps}}
64	
65	请只输出操作类动作 (禁止 assert_*), 输出 {"actions": [...]} JSON."""
66	
67	_BLOCK_ASSERT_USER = """\
68	模块路径: {{module_path}}
69	执行块: 第 {{block_no}} / {{total_blocks}} (仅断言, 本块操作已在上一阶段完成)
70	
71	预期结果:
72	{{expectations}}
73	
74	请只输出断言类动作 (assert_text / assert_count / assert_table), 输出 {"actions": [...]} JSON."""
75	
76	
77	class ActionPlanner:
78	    """把 ParsedCase 中的自然语言步骤规划成不含选择器的动作列表."""
79	
80	    def __init__(self, llm: LLMAdapter, prompts: PromptLoader, skill_text: str = "") -> None:
81	        self.llm = llm
82	        self.prompts = prompts
83	        self.skill_text = skill_text
84	
85	    def generate_actions(self, case: ParsedCase, roles: list[str] = None) -> tuple[list[PlannedAction], str]:
86	        """返回 (动作列表, 模型原始响应)."""
87	        # 系统提示词可由 prompts/action_plan.system.md 或 config 覆盖.
88	        system_base = self.prompts.system("action_plan", _DEFAULT_SYSTEM)
89	        # skill.md 中的组件库经验注入到最前面, 让规划阶段能理解领域约定.
90	        system = (self.skill_text + "\n\n" + system_base) if self.skill_text else system_base
91	
92	        # 步骤和预期都保留编号, 方便模型稳定按原始顺序输出动作.
93	        pre_text = "\n".join(f"- {p}" for p in case.preconditions) or "(无)"
94	        res_text = _format_resources(case.resources)
95	        steps_text = "\n".join(f"{i+1}. {s}" for i, s in enumerate(case.steps)) or "(无)"
96	        exp_text = "\n".join(f"{i+1}. {e}" for i, e in enumerate(case.expectations)) or "(无)"
97	        roles_text = ", ".join(roles) if roles else "(未提供)"
98	        user = self.prompts.user(
99	            "action_plan", _DEFAULT_USER,
100	            case_id=case.case_id,
101	            module_path=" / ".join(case.module_path),
102	            priority=case.priority or "(未提供)",
103	            preconditions=pre_text,
104	            resources=res_text,
105	            pre_count=case.precondition_step_count,
106	            steps=steps_text,
107	            expectations=exp_text,
108	            roles=roles_text,
109	        )
110	
111	        result = self.llm.complete_json("action_plan", system, user)
112	        # 模型返回可能有别名/中文键, 统一交给 _extract_actions 做容错转换.
113	        actions = _extract_actions(result.data)
114	        return actions, result.raw
115	
116	    def generate_block_actions(
117	        self,
118	        case: ParsedCase,
119	        block: ExecutionBlock,
120	        roles: list[str] = None,
121	        block_no: int = 1,
122	        total_blocks: int = 1,
123	    ) -> tuple[list[PlannedAction], list[Any]]:
124	        """按执行块规划: 先仅操作, 再仅断言 (供交错式用例分块执行)."""
125	        system_base = self.prompts.system("action_plan", _DEFAULT_SYSTEM)
126	        system = (self.skill_text + "\n\n" + system_base) if self.skill_text else system_base
127	        roles_text = ", ".join(roles) if roles else "(未提供)"
128	        actions: list[PlannedAction] = []
129	        raws: list[Any] = []
130	
131	        if block.operations:
132	            steps_text = "\n".join(f"{i + 1}. {s}" for i, s in enumerate(block.operations)) or "(无)"
133	            user = self.prompts.user(
134	                "action_plan_block_ops", _BLOCK_OPS_USER,
135	                case_id=case.case_id,
136	                module_path=" / ".join(case.module_path),
137	                block_no=block_no,
138	                total_blocks=total_blocks,
139	                pre_count=case.precondition_step_count if block_no == 1 else 0,
140	                steps=steps_text,
141	                roles=roles_text,
142	            )
143	            result = self.llm.complete_json("action_plan", system, user)
144	            actions.extend(_extract_actions(result.data))
145	            raws.append(result.raw)
146	
147	        if block.expectations:
148	            exp_text = "\n".join(f"{i + 1}. {e}" for i, e in enumerate(block.expectations)) or "(无)"
149	            user = self.prompts.user(
150	                "action_plan_block_assert", _BLOCK_ASSERT_USER,
151	                case_id=case.case_id,
152	                module_path=" / ".join(case.module_path),
153	                block_no=block_no,
154	                total_blocks=total_blocks,
155	                expectations=exp_text,
156	                roles=roles_text,
157	            )
158	            result = self.llm.complete_json("action_plan", system, user)
159	            actions.extend(_extract_actions(result.data))
160	            raws.append(result.raw)
161	
162	        return actions, raws
163	
164	
165	def _extract_actions(data) -> list[PlannedAction]:
166	    """从模型返回中提取动作数组, 兼容单动作对象和中文字段名."""
167	    raw_list = None
168	    if isinstance(data, dict):
169	        raw_list = data.get("actions") or data.get("动作列表") or data.get("动作")
170	        if raw_list is None and "type" in data:
171	            # 少数模型会直接返回单个动作对象, 这里包装成列表继续处理.
172	            raw_list = [data]
173	    elif isinstance(data, list):
174	        raw_list = data
175	    out: list[PlannedAction] = []
176	    for item in raw_list or []:
177	        a = coerce_action(item)
178	        if a is not None:
179	            # 非法动作被丢弃, 避免一个坏项拖垮整条用例.
180	            out.append(a)
181	    return out
182	
183	
184	def _format_resources(resources: dict) -> str:
185	    """把用例资源定义格式化给动作规划器, 供 upload 动作选择 value."""
186	    if not resources:
187	        return "(无)"
188	    lines = []
189	    for name, res in resources.items():
190	        source = getattr(res, "source", "")
191	        filename = getattr(res, "filename", "")
192	        lines.append(f"- {name}: 来源={source}, 文件名={filename}")
193	    return "\n".join(lines)
194
```
</details></tool-use>
